dataset_name: Offline Web Mandarin-to-Cantonese Text Translator Data
architecture: fixed phrases + typed templates + slot values + rewrite rules + lexicon

normalization_policy.slot_values: same-form or script-only rows are allowed solely as semantic classification metadata and are not counted as translation mappings
normalization_policy.identity_templates: allowed only when typed slots or transforms provide compositional value

license: CC BY-SA 3.0 because the package still includes adapted CC-Canto-derived material; see ATTRIBUTION.md
quality_notice: Generated frame templates, compact templates and slot banks require native-speaker review before production release.
